inputs.label: Compression Ratio (r)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of cylinder volume at BDC to TDC. Typical diesel: 12-24.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of cylinder volume at BDC to TDC. Typical diesel: 12-24.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Silindir hacminin ÜÖN'deki hacme oranı. Tipik dizel: 12-24.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis des Zylindervolumens bei UT zu OT. Typischer Diesel: 12-24.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport du volume du cylindre au PMB et au PMH. Diesel typique : 12-24.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación del volumen del cilindro en PMI a PMS. Diésel típico: 12-24.

inputs.label: Cutoff Ratio (rc)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of volume after combustion to clearance volume. Typical: 1.5-3.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of volume after combustion to clearance volume. Typical: 1.5-3.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yanma sonrası hacmin boşluk hacmine oranı. Tipik: 1.5-3.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis des Volumens nach der Verbrennung zum Totraumvolumen. Typisch: 1,5-3.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport du volume après combustion au volume mort. Typique : 1,5-3.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación del volumen después de la combustión al volumen de holgura. Típico: 1.5-3.

inputs.label: Initial Temperature (T1)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature at start of compression (state 1). Standard ambient: 300 K.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature at start of compression (state 1). Standard ambient: 300 K.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıkıştırma başlangıcındaki sıcaklık (durum 1). Standart ortam: 300 K.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur zu Beginn der Verdichtung (Zustand 1). Standard-Umgebung: 300 K.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température au début de la compression (état 1). Ambiante standard : 300 K.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura al inicio de la compresión (estado 1). Ambiente estándar: 300 K.

inputs.label: Initial Pressure (p1)
inputs.businessContext: Pressure at start of compression (state 1). Atmospheric: 101325 Pa.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pressure at start of compression (state 1). Atmospheric: 101325 Pa.
businessContext_i18n.de: Druck zu Beginn der Verdichtung (Zustand 1). Atmosphärisch: 101325 Pa.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression au début de la compression (état 1). Atmosphérique : 101325 Pa.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión al inicio de la compresión (estado 1). Atmosférica: 101325 Pa.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (k)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio cp/cv for air. Typically 1.4 for diatomic gases.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio cp/cv for air. Typically 1.4 for diatomic gases.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hava için cp/cv oranı. Tipik olarak 1.4 (diatomik gazlar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis cp/cv für Luft. Typischerweise 1,4 für zweiatomige Gase.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport cp/cv pour l'air. Généralement 1,4 pour les gaz diatomiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación cp/cv para el aire. Típicamente 1.4 para gases diatómicos.

inputs.label: Specific Heat (cv)
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat at constant volume for air. Standard: 718 J/(kg·K).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific heat at constant volume for air. Standard: 718 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hava için sabit hacimde özgül ısı. Standart: 718 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Wärme bei konstantem Volumen für Luft. Standard: 718 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chaleur spécifique à volume constant pour l'air. Standard : 718 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.es: Calor específico a volumen constante para el aire. Estándar: 718 J/(kg·K).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
